name: io.github.alexgrebeshok-coder/construction-maps-mcp
title: Construction Maps MCP
description: MCP server for pre-construction land parcel analysis — Rosreestr cadastre data, Yandex Maps geocoding, infrastructure proximity, and geometry tools.

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_MAPS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Yandex Maps API key (required for geocoding and maps)

environmentVariables.name: YANDEX_RATE_LIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Yandex API rate limit (requests per minute)

environmentVariables.name: ROSREESTR_RATE_LIMIT_RPM
environmentVariables.description: Rosreestr API rate limit (requests per minute)
